strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB (e.g., Direct Mail automation platform at Optilyz)
Strong architecture and scalability focus (e.g., event-driven Geo-Data platform with Kubernetes support at GISCollective)
AI-agent infrastructure development (e.g., MCP code generators and frameworks at re:cinq)
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js (primary stack requirement) in listed roles
No explicit mention of Vitest testing framework (primary stack requirement) in employment history
Secondary stack (Kotlin/Java) is present but not prominently featured in recent roles
response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React experience and AI-agent development (re:cinq role), which aligns well with primary stack requirements. However, Nest.js (primary stack) and Vitest (testing framework) are not explicitly mentioned in employment history, and Kotlin/Java (secondary stack) is present but not recent. The re:cinq role shows relevance but lacks duration (April 2025-Present) for evaluation.
